title: Disx Plus
description: Adds new custom discs to minecraft!
body:
**This datapack/mod adds more discs to minecraft!**

**How to use?**

Type /function disx_plus:help to see all commands.
MOST important cmd [/function disx_plus:give_all_discs] to receive all discs.
**CHRISTMAS UPDATE:[/function disx_plus:christmas_pack]**
**For mod FABRIC API IS REQUIERED**
Showcase
